testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
15:35:03.961 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.surveyapp.SurveyAppApplicationTests]: SurveyAppApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 15:35:04.050 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.surveyapp.SurveyAppApplication for test class com.surveyapp.SurveyAppApplicationTests

Check the community dialects project for available legacy versions. 2026-03-16T15:35:06.605Z WARN 5554 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: PostgreSQLDialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-03-16T15:35:07.515Z INFO 5554 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) 2026-03-16T15:35:07.544Z WARN 5554 --- [ main] o.h.t.s.i.ExceptionHandlerLoggedImpl : GenerationTarget encountered exception accepting command : Error executing DDL " create table answers ( id bigserial not null, question_id bigint not null, response_id bigint not null, value TEXT, primary key (id) )" via JDBC [Syntax error in SQL statement "\000a create table answers (\000a id bigserial not null,\000a question_id bigint not null,\000a response_id bigint not null,\000a [*]value TEXT,\000a primary key (id)\000a )"; expected "identifier";]

~[surefire-booter-3.0.0.jar:3.0.0] at org.apache.maven.surefire.booter.ForkedBooter.main(ForkedBooter.java:495) ~[surefire-booter-3.0.0.jar:3.0.0] Caused by: org.h2.jdbc.JdbcSQLSyntaxErrorException: Syntax error in SQL statement "\000a create table answers (\000a id bigserial not null,\000a question_id bigint not null,\000a response_id bigint not null,\000a [*]value TEXT,\000a primary key (id)\000a )"; expected "identifier"; SQL statement:
